snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

Read more here:
https://news.sky.com/story/northern-ireland-ministers-condemn-deplorable-violence-following-emergency-meeting-12269214

localized.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
localized.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

es-419.title: perdiendo el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Crucé una línea que nunca había cruzado en la adicción".

En la primera parte de esta valiente serie documental, Demi Lovato, su familia y amigos revelan por primera vez lo que la llevó a una sobredosis casi mortal.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.”

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

pt-BR.title: perdendo o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Ultrapassei um limite que nunca tinha cruzado no vício.”

Na primeira parte dessa destemida série documental, Demi Lovato, sua família e amigos falam com franqueza, pela primeira vez, sobre o que levou à overdose quase fatal.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741

ko.title: 통제를 잃다 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"중독에 있어서 절대 넘지 않았던 선을 넘었어요"

대담한 다큐멘터리 시리즈 1편에서, 데미 로바토와 가족, 친구들은 데미가 목숨을 잃을 뻔한 약물 과다 복용에 이르기까지의 상황에 관해 처음으로 솔직하게 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

“I crossed a line I’d never crossed in addiction.” 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

pt-BR.title: renascimento : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Eu já tive várias vidas – como meu gato, estou na minha última.”
A explosiva série documental de Demi Lovato termina com revelações sobre o noivado rompido, sua volta ao estúdio e sua exploração da sobriedade moderada enquanto ela tenta se livrar do passado e encontrar sua verdade.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Amor é muito mais do que um sentimento. Envie loveis para 22522 para ter apoio e aprender a compreender relacionamentos saudáveis.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Envie: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku mempunyai banyak nyawa – seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.”
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich hatte viele Leben, wie meine Katze. Das ist mein neuntes."
Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit Enthüllungen über ihre gelöste Verlobung, ihre Rückkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maßvollen Konsums, während sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

ko.title: 환생 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"저는 제 고양이처럼 목숨이 아홉 개예요. 아홉 번째 인생을 살고 있죠"
데미 로바토의 파혼, 녹음실 복귀 이야기와 음주와 약물의 적정량 사용을 통해 과거를 놓고 진실한 삶을 살려는 시도를 공개하며 폭발적인 다큐멘터리 시리즈는 막을 내린다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인

TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

사랑은 존중입니다. 사랑은 감정 그 이상입니다. 22522로 loveis를 보내시면 도움과 함께 건강한 관계에 관해 배울 수 있습니다.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453

es-419.title: renacimiento : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"He tenido muchas vidas. Como mi gato, estoy en mi última vida".
La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploración de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrás su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

El amor es respeto. El amor es algo más que lo que se siente. Envía loveis al 22522 para obtener apoyo y ayuda para entender las relaciones saludables.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Texto: loveis al 22522
Chat en línea: www.loveisrespect.org

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"J'ai plusieurs vies, comme un chat. J'en suis à ma neuvième."

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche à sa fin avec des révélations sur ses fiançailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expérimentation d'une thérapie de la modération tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passé et de vivre sa vérité. 

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
L'amour est du respect. L'amour va plus loin que les sentiments. Envoyez "loveis" au 22522 pour soutenir et comprendre ce qu'est une relation saine.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS : loveis au 22522
Chat en ligne : www.loveisrespect.org
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.
 
Pour vous aider dans votre processus de guérison, rendez-vous sur Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: REAL Friend Turns FAKE Friend! *I'M KICKED OFF THE CHEER SQUAD*
snippet.description:
The most popular girl at high school doesn't like me. My best friend is the most popular, prettiest and richest girl at school. Everyone wants to be here friend. I went out with my best friends ex boyfriend and she found out my secret. My friend is very upset at me and she has kicked me off the cheerleading squad and won't invite me to her party. I need apologize to her so we can be friends again and I can be part of her squad.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow​ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How’s this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We’ve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he’s lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you’ll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it’s not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: R.I.P Claude Callegari | Father, Grand Father, Friend And A Proud Arsenal Fan
snippet.description:
R.I.P Claude Callegari | Father, Grand Father, Friend And A Proud Arsenal Fan.

We are absolutely devastated today to learn of the death of Claude Callegari, one of the channel’s most popular contributors.

Claude was a much loved figure during his time on the channel and through his passion for Arsenal was able to connect with fans from around the globe on a meaningful level.

We had continued to privately support Claude during his time away from the channel during the pandemic and the news of his passing comes as a deep shock to everyone at AFTV and in the wider Arsenal community.
 
We will not be publishing any content on our platform over the next few days whilst we come to terms with the news of his passing.

If you would like to donate towards supporting Claude's funeral, memorial and family, you can do so here: https://gofund.me/2a22766a

(This is the official 'GoFundMe' page set-up by his family.)

snippet.title: Footballers audition to become Sergio Aguero's replacement at Man City!
snippet.description:
It's 442oons time! Manchester City legend Sergio Aguero has announced he is leaving Man City at the end of this season! The striker, who is the record foreign goalscorer in the Premier League, will end his Man City career in the summer and the hunt for Aguero's replacement is on! But which footballer will Pep Guardiola choose to be Sergio Aguero's replacement at The Aguero Factor? 

#Aguero #ManCity #442oons

Check back Monday to Friday for the OneFootball Daily News, plus all the other Premier League, Bundesliga, La Liga, Serie A and European and world football content we have going up on the channel regularly!

snippet.title: KSI – Patience (feat. YUNGBLUD & Polo G) [Official Video]
snippet.description:
Stream KSI – Patience (feat. YUNGBLUD & Polo G) - https://ksi.lnk.to/Patience!OV

Follow KSI 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ksi/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KSIOlajidebt/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/KSI?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1nzgtKYFckznkcVMR3Gg4z?si=m-pgESzgR4OH4AT0ZMuENg 

Follow YUNGBLUD

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/yungblud/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yungblud/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/yungblud?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6Ad91Jof8Niiw0lGLLi3NW?si=xFennoJfSbasocQ702eXrg 

Follow Polo G

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/polo.capalot/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pologofficial/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Polo_Capalot?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AgTAQt8XS6jRWi4sX7w49?si=YTISKuMXQ92gSOXmi5m_Gw 

Lyrics: 

KSI
Little bit  little bit 
I Need a little bit of patience
Coz we be going through changes
 
Polo G
Ah, ah no patience i’ve had enough.
Spent too much time through these phases, it’s just not adding up
Felt all alone on those stages.
Wanna get my passion up,
It’s over, pack it up
Don’t walk away from me.
When the night falls, make the right call.
Or she’ll be gone forever.
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart won’t change
If my head don’t break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos we’ve been going through changes
 
KSI
Woooooahhhhhh
Need a little space to slow the brain
I don’t really wanna feel the pain.
Seen a lot of shit to make me hate
I don’t wanna hide until it’s too late
Feels like i’m gonna break
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart won’t change
If my head don’t break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos we’ve been going through changes
 
 
KSI
Woooooahhhhhh
Bridges burning, i won’t let you get to me
Tables turning i don’t need bad energy
Now i’m learning, lying bout our chemistry
No returnin, 
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart won’t change
If my head don’t break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos we’ve been going through changes
 
 
KSI
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes


Music Management: Mams Taylor - mams@properloud.com 
https://www.properloud.com/

Directed By Troy Roscoe - :https://www.instagram.com/troyroscoe/
Co-Directed By Nayip Ramos - https://www.instagram.com/nayipramos/?hl=en

RBC Records - https://rbcrecords.com/ 

BMG - https://www.bmg.com/us/

#KSI #YUNGBLUD #POLOG

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It’s Saturday morning, so you know what time it is… Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We’ve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who’s in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it’ll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo’s bonnet, you’ll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that’s not all… The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Dollar Store Makeover
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

____CONTACT ME____

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

snippet.title: GT-R NISMO v 911 Turbo S v R8 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

You know what time it is… Time for another EPIC carwow drag race! We’ve got Mat in a Nissan GT-R NISMO, and he’s going up against an Audi R8 V10 Performance & a Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

But how do they compare? First up, Mat’s GT-R NISMO is powered by a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V6 which can produce 600hp & 650Nm. The R8 alongside him has a 5.2-litre V10 with 625hp & 590Nm of torque. And then finally we have the Porsche, which has a 3.8-litre flat-six turbo to produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

So, there's one thing they have in common - they’re all absolutely awesome machines! But of course, there can only be one winner - so who’s your money on? We know how quick the 911 Turbo is, so it may be a foregone conclusion when it comes to who snatches the win... But could Mat snatch second place from Yianni in the Audi R8?

There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us their GT-R NISMO - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

.............................................................

Instagram – http://www.instagram.com/carwow

Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@carwow

Facebook – http://www.facebook.com/carwowuk

Twitter – http://www.twitter.com/carwowuk

Sign Up to our Newsletter – http://bit.ly/carwow-Newsletter

Awkward haggling is a thing of the past with carwow. Choose your perfect car with our configurator tool and let the country’s best dealers compete over you. Compare the five best offers by price, location and dealer ratings and choose the one that’s right for you – no hassle, no haggling, just a great deal. 

Oder auch in Deutschland Geld beim Autokauf sparen – http://bit.ly/carwow-DE

Visita nuestra página web para saber cuánto te puedes ahorrar en tu nuevo coche – http://bit.ly/carwow-ES

snippet.title: Efendi - Mata Hari - Azerbaijan 🇦🇿 - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Efendi will represent Azerbaijan at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Mata Hari.

-

Music & Lyrics: Amy van der Wel, Josh Earl, Luuk van Beers, Tony Cornelissen
Music production and mixing: Roc-A-Ville Music ZEELAND The Netherlands 
Additional Recordings and Co-production: Beat Music BAKU Azerbaijan Mastering by Vespa Music Group TORONTO Canada
Director & DOP: Ilya Mikhaylus
Production designer: Oleg Lebed
Make up & Hair Supervisor: Jana Shtepa 
Line Producer: Vladimir Buhai 
1 AD: Olga Dereshpol
Choreography: Adelina Deli
Executive Producer: Valeria Tkachuk
Editing: Aleksandra Bugai
Colour grading: Dmytriy Lukjanenko

-

Lyrics:
Imma godless
Spy imma spy I uncover
All of your secrets I want them There’s no stopping me now
I’m a liar
Playing the game of desire Ain’t gonna leave no survivors Would you fall for me now?
Just like Cleopatra The Army Of Lovers I start a fire
Yalan da men yanan da men yaman da men

Ma ma ma Mata Hari Mata Hari
[Ma ma ma ma
Ma ma ma ma
Ma ma ma ma]
Ma ma ma Mata Hari Mata Hari
[Ma ma ma ma
Ma ma ma ma
Ma ma ma ma
Ma ma ma ma] Mata Hari
Undercover
I am a dangerous lover Drinking my poisonous water and you’re under my spell
Mesmerising
Moving my hips you are trying you can’t resist, try to fight it Got a story to tell?
Just like Cleopatra The Army Of Lovers I start a fire
Yalan da men yanan da men yaman da men [Chorus]

Ma ma ma ma Ma ma ma ma Ma ma ma ma Ma ma ma ma
Just like Cleopatra Let’s start a fire Let’s go!

Ma ma ma ma Mata Hari
Ma ma ma ma Ma ma ma ma Mata Hari
Mata Hari

-

About Dan & Riya:
Welcome to the Dan and Riya channel! Our names are Dan Kipnis and Riya Malik. We are best friends for over 15 years who decided to start making YouTube videos. We think we are the funniest people out there, so our job is to make you laugh for hours as you binge watch all our videos every single day on our YouTube channel!. Our channel is made up of comedic skits. Most of them take place in the world of Beverly Valley High where you have Dan, Riya, Tootsie, Cinnamon, Raja, Chad, Miss P, Riya's Dad and Riya's Mom. Our skits are for every age and are about everything including; relationships, boys, girls,, love, how to survive school, families, and friendship!
Step into our world and become part of the DanAndRiyaFam!
